# Replication and Re-analysis: Composition and Projection of Co-Speech Gestures (Esipova, 2019)

## Repository Contents

* **`statistics_project_Esipova.R`** The main R script containing all data processing, assumption checks, the CLMM specification, and post-hoc pairwise comparisons (via estimated marginal means).
* **`Composition+and+projection+of+co-speech+gestures_+tidy+data.csv`** The original, processed dataset used for the analysis.
* **`Project_Report.txt`** The raw console output log generated by running the R script. It contains all test statistics, model summaries, and adjusted p-values.
* **`Dobrynina_statistics_project.pdf`** The final project text. This document includes the methodology, statistical justifications, linguistic interpretations, and a detailed comparison between our CLMM approach and the original author's LMM approach.
* **`(Esipova 2019)Composition and projection.pdf`** The original published paper, included for theoretical reference.
